prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约16899→17514→21053→37669→24815名，2024年出现异常大幅后移（37669名），2025年显著回弹至24815名，波动剧烈；2025 年基准位次约24815名；该校在辽宁物理类招生计划2021年38人、2022年43人、2023年41人、2024年47人、2025年46人、2026年57人，2026年较2025年扩 招11人（增幅约23.9%），扩招幅度较大，对位次有显著后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 云南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年从第83位稳步上升至第71位，层次 持续提升；2025年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面（就业数据问题）；抖音热度一般；无投档断档记录；民族学A+、生态学A、统计学A-；物理类 招生专业中统计学对应统计学A-，生态学（菁英班）对应生态学A，计算机类、电子信息类等虽未获A类评级但属社会热门方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业涵盖计算 机类、电子信息类、统计学、临床医学等社会高热推荐专业，报考吸引力强；辽宁省2026年物理类考生估算约14.36万人，与2025年基本持平；省控线2025年物理类本科批367分， 与2024年368分基本持平；云南大学位于西南地区，对辽宁考生属远距离报考，地域偏好偏弱；该校在辽宁物理类招生占比近年有所提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综 合2025年位次回弹趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+23.9%）、热门专业吸引力强及考生总数持平等因素，扩招带来的位次后移效应与热门专业吸引力的上移效应相互对冲；预测最低位次 约27875名，区间27375–28375名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 16899 → 17514 → 21053 → 37669 → 24815, with an abnormal large drop in 2024 (37669) and a significant rebound in 2025 to 24815, showing drastic fluctuations; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 24815; the enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Physics Category was 38 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 47 in 2024, 46 in 2025, and 57 in 2026, with an increase of 11 students in 2026 compared to 2025 (an increase of about 23.9%), a relatively large expansion that exerts significant downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 83rd to 71st in recent years, with continuously improving level; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (employment data issues); Douyin popularity is average; no record of admission cutoff breaks; Ethnology A+, Ecology A, Statistics A-; among the Physics Category enrollment majors, Statistics corresponds to Statistics A-, Ecology (Elite Class) corresponds to Ecology A, and Computer Class, Electronic Information Class, etc., although not rated A-class, are socially popular directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category enrollment majors include Computer Class, Electronic Information Class, Statistics, Clinical Medicine, and other highly recommended socially popular majors, with strong application appeal; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Liaoning Province in 2026 is about 143,600, roughly the same as in 2025; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 367 points, basically unchanged from 368 points in 2024; Yunnan University is located in the southwest region, which is a long-distance application for Liaoning examinees, with weak regional preference; the proportion of this university's enrollment in Liaoning Physics Category has increased in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (+23.9%), strong appeal of popular majors, and stable total number of examinees, the downward effect of expansion on rankings and the upward effect of popular major appeal offset each other; the predicted minimum ranking is about 27875, with a range of 27375–28375.

[School Level] Yunnan University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking on the Soft Science China University Main List was 83rd in 2021 → 82nd in 2022 → 80th in 2023 → 70th in 2024 → 69th in 2025 → 71st in 2026, consistently within the top 80 nationally, with a steadily improving level.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to attention drawn by employment rate data from the School of Life Sciences; the comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin was 62nd, rated as average; no significant record of admission cut-off gaps was observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ethnology received A+, Ecology A, and Statistics A-, totaling 3 disciplines at A- or above; among the History Category enrollment majors, Law, Chinese Language and Literature, History, etc., have a general correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of History Category-related majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, etc.) is polarized, with Law being relatively hot but highly competitive, and Journalism and Communication being clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates in Liaoning Province for 2026 is approximately 200,000, with an estimated 56,400 in the History Category based on recent proportions, roughly unchanged from 2025; the provincial control line for the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch was 437 points, a significant increase from 400 points in 2024, reflecting a tightening overall competitive environment; Yunnan University is located in Kunming, Yunnan Province, which is a long-distance cross-province application for Liaoning candidates, with a relatively weak regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning is small, with no significant local bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, unchanged enrollment plan, somewhat negative reputation, rising provincial control line, and geographical distance, based on the 2025 baseline of 4431, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4451, with a range of 3951–4951.
